rabbit-with-cream-and-bacon-teleculinari.name: Rabbit With Cream And Bacon
instructions: Season the rabbit with salt, pepper, blond and white wine. Tape with adhesive film and lead to cold for 1 hour.

After the time indicated, peel the onion and garlic and pinch them. Lie in a pot, add the olive oil, take it to the fire and let it saute until the onion becomes transparent. Add the bacon and let it shine.
Add the rabbit and let it cook until the meat is golden. Add the creams, cover and let cook, in mild heat, for 50 minutes, or until the meat becomes soft.

In the meantime, pour the couscous into a bowl, season it with salt and cover it with boiling water until a finger is above the couscous. Tape with adhesive film and let moisturize for about 10 minutes.
Then remove the film, release the couscous with a fork, wrap a thread of olive oil and place it on a platter. Place the rabbit on the couscous, sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve.

radish-avocado-toast.name: Radish Avocado Toast
instructions: Thinly slice all the fresh radishes. Set aside.
Cut the avocado in half, and use a knife to slice the inside, then scoop out the avocado into a bowl.
Mash the avocado with lime, salt and pepper.
Spread the mixture on some toasted bread.
Top the avocado toast with the sliced radishes and any other garnishes you would like.
Sprinkle with salt and cracked pepper.
Enjoy!

ranch-fun-dip-with-crudites.name: Ranch Fun Dip With Crudités

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Special equipment: a spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Toast pistachios in a medium skillet over medium heat, shaking and tossing often, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Transfer to spice mill or mortar and pestle and let cool.

Add nutritional yeast and salt to pistachios and grind or pound until the texture of coarse meal. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in Aleppo-style pepper, dill, sugar, onion powder, and garlic powder.
Serve dip with crudités.
Do Ahead: Ranch Fun Dip can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

ranch-mix-saltine-crackers.name: Ranch Mix Saltine Crackers
instructions: Place oil and ranch dressing mix into a 2-gallon resealable plastic bag; seal the bag and shake until well combined.
Add crackers and shake until crackers are evenly coated.
Set crackers aside to absorb coating, about 3 hours, shaking the bag every 30 minutes. Enjoy as a snack or with a dip.

recipe-for-mushrooms-stuffed-with-spinac.name: Recipe For Mushrooms Stuffed With Spinach And Cheese

recipe-for-sauteed-rice-with-prawn-and-g.name: Recipes For Sautéed Rice With Prague and Green Beans

200 g de langostinos crudos (pelados y limpios)

instructions: Warm the oil into a large frying pan or wok. Add the garlic and skip a few seconds till you have some smell.
It incorporates the locusts, slightly peppery and cooks for 2 or 3 minutes till pink. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add the pods and mixed vegetables. Cooking 3 to 5 minutes till they are tender but crispy.
If you wear an egg, put them aside and pour the beamed egg. Revolves and cooks as a riot, then mixes with vegetables.
Add the baked rice, separating the grains with the spatula. The fire goes up and removes well.
Vierte la salsa de soja y la salsa de ostras, mezcla todo hasta que el arroz tome color y sabor uniforme.
Readd the locusts and mix gently. Cooking 1 more minute and serving hot.

recipe-for-vegetarian-pad-thai-a-thai-di.name: Recipe For Vegetarian Pad Thai, A Thai Dish For You To Enjoy As A Family
recipe-for-vegetarian-pad-thai-a-thai-di.original_name: Receta de pad thai vegetariano, un platillo tailandés para que lo degustes en familia

ingredients.item: 150 gr de fideos o tallarines de arroz
2 cdas de siracha o alguna salsa picante
2 cdas de salsa de soja oscura

instructions: Inicia la receta y prepara los fideos, de acuerdo a las indicaciones del empaque.
In a pot with enough water, cook them till they get to the dente. Drain, add a tablespoon of olive oil so they don't stick and reserve.
Ahora, toma los pimentones, la cebolla, y el diente de ajoy corta en julianas.
Warm a frying pan with olive oil and add the vegetables. It's been leaping at medium heat for about 5 minutes.
Now, sew up the vegetables with soya sauces, siracha, coconut milk, ginger fringes, lemon juice, fish sauce and a pint of salt. Mix and cook for 3 minutes.
Procede y sube el fuego. Ahora, incorpora los fideos. Mezcla hasta que se integre con toda la salsa. Saltea por 5 minutos y apaga.
Serves hot, don't let them get cold. He's with sprouts and lemon.
Enjoy!

red-snapper-with-athenian-sauce.name: Red Snapper With Athenian Sauce
instructions: Combine green bell pepper, tomato, onion, olive oil, olives, lemon juice, green onion, capers, garlic, sugar, salt, and pepper in a heavy pan over medium-high heat. Saute until all ingredients are slightly wilted, 5 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm.

Heat olive oil in a heavy pan over medium heat. Add snapper fillets to hot oil. Sprinkle Greek seasoning on top and cook for 2 to 3 minutes. Turn fish over and cook on the other side for 2 more minutes. Turn fish back to the original side and finish cooking until fish is tender and flakes easily with a fork, another 1 to 2 minutes.
Pour still-hot Athenian sauce over fish just before serving. Sprinkle about 2 ounces feta cheese and 1 tablespoon of parsley over each portion.

red-velvet-cinnamon-rolls.name: Red Velvet Cinnamon Rolls
instructions: Combine warm water and yeast for dough in the bowl of a stand mixer; beat until combined. Allow to sit and bloom, 5 to 10 minutes. Yeast should activate and mixture should have foam on top.
Add flour, cake mix, warm milk, and salt. Switch to the dough hook and mix on low until dough comes together and starts to pull away from the sides, about 5 minutes.

Grease a large bowl with a light coating of oil. Form dough into a ball and place in the greased bowl, turning to coat all sides. Cover with plastic wrap and a towel. Place the bowl over a pan of hot water and let sit until almost doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Mix butter, brown and white sugars, and cinnamon for filling together in a medium bowl until well combined.
Spray a large baking pan with baking spray.

Turn dough onto a floured surface and roll into a large rectangle. Spread filling over the dough, then roll up into a long log. Slice into 12 rolls and place on the prepared pan. Allow to rise until doubled in size, 30 to 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Bake rolls in the preheated oven until golden, 20 to 25 minutes.

While the rolls are baking, combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, butter, milk, and vanilla for icing in a bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth and pourable. Transfer icing to a plastic zip-top bag.
Remove cinnamon rolls from the oven. Snip a corner off of the zip-top bag and drizzle icing over the warm rolls. Serve immediately.

red-winebraised-short-ribs-with-carrots.name: Red Wine–braised Short Ribs With Carrots
instructions: Season short ribs with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Working in batches, cook short ribs until browned on all sides, 8–10 minutes per batch; transfer to a plate. Pour off fat from pot.

Add pancetta to same pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until fat is rendered and pancetta begins to brown, 5–7 minutes. Add onion, thyme, and carrots. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is softened, about 5 minutes. Add wine and tomatoes and bring to a boil. Return short ribs to pot, pressing down to submerge. Cover pot, reduce heat, and simmer until short ribs are very tender and meat is almost falling off the bone, 3 1/2–4 hours.

Transfer short ribs and carrots to a large baking dish or platter and cover with foil to keep warm; discard thyme and any bones in pot. Strain cooking liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl; return to pot. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, and simmer until thickened and reduced by half, 15–20 minutes; season with salt and pepper. Return short ribs to pot and turn to coat.
DO AHEAD: Short ribs can be cooked 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Combine parsley, chives, garlic, and orange zest in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Place short ribs, carrots, and sauce on a large serving platter; serve with gremolata.

reuben-nachos-for-two.name: Reuben Nachos For Two
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add corned beef and cook until crisp on all sides, about 5 minutes.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Place drained sauerkraut in a bowl with caraway seed; stir to combine.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven\\u2019s broiler to high.'}

{'step': '4', 'description': 'Place 1/2 of the chips in an oven-proof skillet. Scatter 1/2 of the corned beef and 1/2 of the sauerkraut on top of the chips. Drizzle 1/2 of the Thousand Island dressing over the corned beef and top with 1/2 of the Swiss cheese. Repeat layers once more.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Broil in the preheated oven until cheese has melted, about 5 minutes.'}

rib-roast.name: Rib Roast

ingredients.prep: chine bone removed (6–6 0.5 lb.), bones unfrenched

ingredients.item: Oil-packed anchovy fillets (from about one 2-oz. tin or jar)
ingredients.prep: plus more for serving, if desired

instructions: Season roast all over with salt and pepper (use about 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal kosher salt or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt per pound; this guideline is especially important with large cuts of meat). Place roast on a wire rack set inside a large rimmed baking sheet (this setup will keep the meat from sitting directly in the liquid that will get drawn out by the salt, allowing it to cook more evenly later). Let sit at room temperature at least 2 hours, or cover and chill up to 2 days. If you’re chilling the meat, move it back to the counter and let it sit at room temperature for the final 2 hours. Taking the chill off of the roast before it goes into the oven means it will cook in less time.
Meanwhile, finely chop 10 anchovies and 2 rosemary sprigs. Transfer to a small bowl and add garlic and olive oil. Mix well to combine and season with salt and pepper.

Preheat oven to 121°C (121°C). Scatter remaining 4 rosemary sprigs across another rimmed baking sheet. Place meat on top and smear anchovy mixture all over. Roast until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 43°C (43°C) for medium-rare, 2–2½ hours (temperature will rise as it sits; it should eventually hit 52°C / 52°C). Let rest at least 30 minutes.

About 20 minutes before you want to sit down to eat, increase oven temperature to 260°C (260°C). Roast meat on the same baking sheet until fat is golden brown, 10–15 minutes. Transfer roast to a cutting board, leaving any pan juices behind. Remove rosemary sprigs from baking sheet; discard. Add ¾ cup parsley to juices and stir to coat. Transfer to a small bowl.

Slice roast away from bones (you can separate bones and crisp up in the oven or serve them as they are). Slice meat to your preferred thickness. Arrange on a platter and pour parsley mixture over. Sprinkle with sea salt and more parsley. Serve with more anchovies alongside if desired.

rich-and-creamy-tomato-basil-soup.name: Rich And Creamy Tomato Basil Soup
instructions: Place tomatoes and juice in a stockpot over medium heat; bring to a simmer. Cook until tomatoes have softened, about 30 minutes.
Remove the pot from heat. Add basil leaves to the pot.
Use an immersion blender to purée soup until smooth.
Stir in heavy cream and butter. Cook and stir over medium heat until butter is melted, about 5 minutes. Do not boil. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot and enjoy!

ricotta-pie-pequerecetas.name: Ricotta Pie

ingredients.item: 200 ml cream to be assembled (at least 35% fat)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180-3-with heat up and down. It forms a mold with an oven paper with a diameter of 22-24 cm, making sure that it stands out at the edges so that as the cake grows, it doesn't spread. No need to grease him.

In a large bowl, beat ricotta cheese with sugar till you get a creamy mixture. Add the eggs one by one, beating well after every addition. It incorporates the cream, the maicena, the lemon frying and the essence of vanilla. Meg up till everything's well integrated and without clumps.

Fold the mixture into the mold and clear the surface with a spatula. Hornea for 45-50 minutes, or until the cake is firm at the edges but slightly trembling at the centre. Turn off the oven and leave the cake inside with the door intersecting for 10-15 minutes to stop it from falling down at once.
Let them cool completely at room temperature and then put them in the refrigerator at least 4 hours before cutting (best if from day to day). Fold with glas sugar before serving if you wish.

risotto-alla-pescatore-lezzet.name: Risotto Alla Pescatore

ingredients.item: 400 gr mixed shell seafood (karides~vongole~midye~kalamar v.b. Home
100 gr tomato sauce or tomato porridge

2. Add white wine.
3. Cook the risotto with the help of the bucket with the help of the white wine.
4. Add mixed seafood near to pee and cook for 5-6 minutes.
5. Mix until the leech, chopped parsley, salt, pepper and olive oil are planted and is a viscous risotto consistency.
6. Take Risottoyu into a pit or light oval tab, serve by adding fesleye and extra virgin olive oil.

roast-beef-sandwiches-with-whole-grain-m.name: Roast Beef Sandwiches With Whole Grain Mustard And Cranberries
instructions: Mix mustard and mayonnaise in small bowl to blend. Spread mustard mixture over both cut sides of ciabatta rolls. Place 1 slice roast beef atop mustard mixture on bottom side of each roll; sprinkle with sea salt and ground black pepper. Top each with 1 tablespoon cranberry sauce, red onion slices, and watercress sprigs. Cover with roll tops and serve.

roast-beef-with-sweet-potatoes-teleculin.name: Roast Beef With Sweet Potatoes

ingredients.item: 800 g  carne de vaca para assar
Salt and pepper ground at height

instructions: Clean the fat meat and put it on an oven tray. Season it with salt, pepper, thyme stems and bar it with mustard. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for 40 minutes.

Wash the potatoes thoroughly and cut them into cubes. Season them with oregano, pepper salt and olive oil. Involve, add to the meat tray and put it in the oven for another 15 minutes. Serve the meat sliced and accompanied with the potatoes.

roast-lamb-wrap-recipe-comedera.name: Roast Lamb Wrap Recipe
roast-lamb-wrap-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de wrap de cordero asado

ingredients.item: 1/4 taza de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

instructions: We started our recipe by preparing the roasted lamb. First, preheat the oven at 180 ″ 3 ″. Wash and dry the boned lamb.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, minced garlic, rosemary, salt and pepper to make a marinade.
Fold the marinade onto the lamb, make sure you cover it evenly. Put the protein into an oven plate and atate it for about 20 minutes or till it's cooked at your best.
Retira del horno y deja reposar la carne por unos minutos antes de desmenuzarla con un tenedor.
The tortillas are now heated into a frying pan until they are slightly golden.
Mezcla el cordero asado con pizca de sal y pimienta, si lo deseas.
On every omelette, it stretches a layer of Greek yogurt and adds the minced lamb, tomato, cucumber, onion and mint leaves. It's important that all the ingredients are spread through the omelette.
Antes de envolver las tortillas, agrega en forma de hilo el aceite de oliva.
It wraps the ingredients into an adjusted cylinder, first by bending the end sides inwards and rolling them up part by part.
Repeat the process with the other tortillas.

roast-meat-with-soda-lezzet.name: Roast Meat With Soda
instructions: 1. Take a deep rough of chopped meats.
2. On 1 bottle of mineral sauce pour, stretch close to the movie and list to at 2 hours in the refrigerator, at the 2 hours in 1 night.

10. Cook in jealous fire for 10 minutes.
11. Son olarak tuz, karabiber ve istenirse kekik serpin.
12. A few get more roasted and served in minutes.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

roast-spare-ribs-with-orange-teleculinar.name: Roast Spare Ribs With Orange
instructions: Place the rind on an oven tray and season it with white wine, pepper paste, chopped garlic teeth, salt, pepper, rosemary and orange juice.
Corte a restante laranja em rodelas e disponha-as sobre a carne. Junte as batatas, previamente descascadas, e regue tudo com o azeite.
Take the tray to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 1 hour, watering from time to time with the sauce itself, until everything is golden and well roasted.

roasted-asparagus-with-balsamic-vinegar.name: Roasted Asparagus With Balsamic Vinegar
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C).
Place asparagus in a shallow 9x13-inch baking dish. Sprinkle with oil, salt, and pepper; toss to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 15 to 20 minutes. Drizzle with vinegar just before serving.

roasted-cauliflower-and-broccoli-soup-le.name: Roasted Cauliflower And Broccoli Soup
instructions: 1. Wash thoroughly after separating brocoli and carnflower flowers.
2. Add crushed garlic, olive oil, salt and spices in a deep container.
3. Add brocoli and carnflower.
4. Oil paper cool on the oven tray.
5. Place vegetables on it.
6. Cook for 10-15 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
7. melt the butter.
8.  Unu ilave edip kavurun.
9. Add 4 water cups chicken water and vegetables you extract from the oven.
10. Cook for 15 minutes on the ground fire.
11. 11. Make it smooth by crushing with Blender.
12. Add salt and boil 1-2 stones.
12. August Serve over the brewed cheese and cube chopped pepper.

roasted-delicata-squash-with-crispy-onio.name: Roasted Delicata Squash With Crispy Onions

ingredients.prep:
halved lengthwise,
seeds removed, sliced  0.5" thick

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat to 400°. Toss 2 medium delicata squash (about 2 lb. total), halved lengthwise, seeds removed, sliced ½" thick, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, and 1 Tbsp. ground cumin in a medium bowl to coat; season generously with kosher salt.

Arrange squash in a single layer on 2 large rimmed baking
sheets, dividing evenly. Roast, turning halfway through, until tender and golden brown,
35–40 minutes. Set squash aside. Reduce oven temperature to 350°.

Mix 1 cup store-bought fried onions, ½ tsp. garlic powder, ½ tsp. ground cumin, ½ tsp. paprika, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl until onions are coated. Spread out in an even layer on another rimmed baking sheet and bake until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Let spiced onions cool slightly.
Meanwhile, whisk juice of ½ lemon, 1 cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, 1 Tbsp. honey, and remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in another small bowl.

To serve, spread yogurt sauce on a platter; arrange reserved squash over. Top with spiced onions, then drizzle with remaining 2 Tbsp. honey. Scatter ½ cup pomegranate seeds and ¼ cup chopped parsley over.

roasted-rainbow-sweet-potatoes-with-dipp.name: Roasted Rainbow Sweet Potatoes With Dipping Sauce 2 Ways

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut lengthwise into 1/2-inch-thick wedges

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Line two 15x10x1-inch baking pans with aluminum foil.
Combine sweet potato wedges, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a very large bowl. Toss to coat. Arrange in a single layer on the prepared baking pans.
Roast in the preheated oven, rotating the pans halfway through, until potatoes are tender and starting to brown, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk mayonnaise, lemon juice, lemon zest, pepper, and salt in a small bowl to make the first dipping sauce.
Whisk mayonnaise, milk, horseradish, dill, and pepper in a separate small bowl to make the second dipping sauce.
Serve sweet potatoes warm or at room temperature with the two sauces for dipping.

roasted-sweet-potato-wedges-with-smoked-.name: Roasted Sweet Potato Wedges With Smoked Chile Cream
instructions: Whisk sour cream, 1 tablespoon green onion tops, chipotle hot sauce, and lime juice in small bowl. Cover and chill. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep refrigerated.

Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 218°C. Combine sweet potato wedges, oil, and cumin in large bowl. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; toss to coat. Arrange potato wedges, cut side down, on 2 rimmed baking sheets. Roast until tender and browned in spots, about 20 minutes, reversing pans halfway through roasting. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm in 218°C oven until heated through, about 5 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Place potato wedges on large platter. Drizzle smoked chile cream over. Sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons green onion tops and serve.

roasted-vegetables.name: Roasted Vegetables
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Toss carrots, cauliflower, and oil on a large rimmed baking sheet. Season with salt and toss again. Place sweet potatoes on a small foil-lined rimmed baking sheet. Roast veggies, tossing once, until browned and tender, 25–30 minutes for carrots and cauliflower and 35–40 minutes for potatoes.

round-english-cake-teleculinaria.name: Round English Cake

ingredients.item: 150 g  sobras de frutas cristalizadas pequenas
150 g nuts, almonds, hazelnuts, raisins, plums and dates
50 ml coffee or bitter almond liqueur
Fruta cristalizada e frutos secos para decorar

instructions: Combine a round shape 18 cm in diameter with butter and sprinkle it with flour. Bring to the fire a pot with brown sugar, molasses, butter and dried fruits, roughly minced. When the ingredients are all connected, remove from the fire and let it cool.

In a bowl, mix the flour with cocoa, bicarbonate, yeast, coffee, cinnamon, nutmeg, clove and scrape from oranges and lemon. Beat the eggs with the dried fruit preparation. Add the juice from all the citrus and the liquor and stir.

Add the flour mixture and finally wrap the crystallized fruit. Lay the dough in shape and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 40 to 45 minutes. Check with a toothpick if the cake is cooked, remove and let it cool completely before deforming. Serve, decorated with more crystallized and dried fruit.

rum-dad-argiro.name: Rum Dad

ingredients.item: 400 gras (or forest fruit or any fruit you want)
400 gras (or forest fruit or any fruit you want)

instructions: Like all yeast yeasts, we have to activate it first.
Dissolve in bowl the yeast with water, half sugar and 3 tablespoons of total flour.
Mix to become dilute porridge.
Cover and let it stand for 15'-20' until it starts foaming, sample that the yeast is activated.
Shake in the mixer's bowl the flour, salt and the rest of the sugar.
We puddle the flour and add the puffed yeast, beaten eggs and lukewarm butter to the middle.
We knead them with the ferment Wing for 4 ́-5 ́. The dough will be full of records and fibers, like gum.
Finally, add the raisins.
With some melted butter, butter a large bowl.
Put the dough in, Dad.
Cover with clean towel and leave in a warm environment (in a lukewarm oven), until the dough doubles in volume and swell well (about 1 hour and something).
We'll use a hole in the middle cake.
We butter the form very well and flour lightly.
Shake the form to remove the excess flour.
Empty the dough, Dad, in the form and without covering it this time, leave it in a warm environment (in a lukewarm oven), to rise again and double until the whole form is filled up above the dough.
About an hour, that's until it doubles in volume.
Bake Dad in a well preheated ocean at 170°C in the air, in the medium grill, for about 35′, until it turns brown, swell well and dissipate from the walls.

Let the cake stand for 10′ in the form and then turn it over, put it on a rack and with a souvli or pointed knife, drill around Dad, making holes everywhere, so it cools complete and dry. We're fixing the syrup.
